CustomField.description: Consolidates product interest from LST Primary 1-3 for reports.
CustomField.formula:
IF( OR(
ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_1__c, "QTS - SYSTEMS PRE-CLINICAL IMAGING FMT (INV FOR REST)") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_2__c, "QTS - SYSTEMS PRE-CLINICAL IMAGING FMT (INV FOR REST)") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_3__c, "QTS - SYSTEMS PRE-CLINICAL IMAGING FMT (INV FOR REST)"), INCLUDES(Product_Interest__c, "QTS"), INCLUDES(Product_Line__c, "QTS"), INCLUDES(BD_Product_Family_Interest__c, "37-QTS")),
"TRUE", "FALSE")
CustomField.label: Summary-QTS
